golden_categories.name: Default Currency Validation
golden_categories.description: Validates general currency formats without specific constraints.

golden_categories.name: No Decimal Allowed
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats where decimals are not allowed.

golden_categories.name: Require Decimal
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats where decimals are mandatory.

golden_categories.name: Specific Decimal Precision
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats with specific digits allowed after the decimal.

golden_categories.name: Require Symbol
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats where a currency symbol is mandatory.

golden_categories.name: Custom Symbol with Negative Sign Before Digits
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats with a custom symbol and negative sign before digits.

golden_categories.name: Negative Sign After Digits
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats where the negative sign appears after the digits.

golden_categories.name: Custom Symbol Without Negatives
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats with a custom symbol and disallows negative values.

golden_categories.name: Custom Symbol with Space and Specific Separators
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats with a custom symbol, space after the symbol, and specific thousands and decimal separators.

golden_categories.name: Custom Symbol with Space After Symbol
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats with a custom symbol, space after the symbol, and specific separators.

golden_categories.name: Custom Symbol After Digits
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats with a custom symbol placed after the digits.

golden_categories.name: Custom Symbol with Negative Sign Before Digits and Space
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats with a custom symbol, negative sign before digits, and space after the symbol.

golden_categories.name: Custom Symbol Without Negatives and Space
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats with a custom symbol, disallows negatives, and allows space after the symbol.

golden_categories.name: Parentheses for Negatives
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats where negative values are enclosed in parentheses.

golden_categories.name: Disallow Negatives
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats where negative values are not allowed.

golden_categories.name: Custom Brazilian Real Format
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats specific to Brazilian Real with custom symbol and separators.

generated_categories.name: Default Behavior
generated_categories.description: Tests the default behavior of the isCurrency validator without any custom options.

generated_categories.name: Symbol Requirements
generated_categories.description: Tests related to the presence, placement, or allowance of the currency symbol.

generated_categories.name: Negative Value Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests that validate the handling of negative values, including disallowing negatives, parentheses for negatives, and placement of the negative sign.

generated_categories.name: Decimal Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests related to the presence, absence, or format of decimal values.

generated_categories.name: Spacing Rules
generated_categories.description: Tests that validate the allowance of spaces in various parts of the currency format.

golden_to_generated.reason: Both categories focus on default behavior without specific constraints or options.
GC-2 validates absence of decimals, which is partially covered by GENC-4's broader focus on decimal handling.
GC-3 validates mandatory decimals, which is partially covered by GENC-4's broader focus on decimal handling.
GC-4 validates specific decimal precision, which is partially covered by GENC-4's broader focus on decimal handling.
Both categories validate the presence and requirements of currency symbols.
GC-6 validates negative sign placement before digits with a custom symbol, which is partially covered by GENC-3's broader focus on negative value handling.
GC-7 validates negative sign placement after digits, which is partially covered by GENC-3's broader focus on negative value handling.
GC-8 validates disallowance of negatives with a custom symbol, which is partially covered by GENC-3's broader focus on negative value handling.
GC-9 validates spacing and separators with a custom symbol, which is partially covered by GENC-5's broader focus on spacing rules.
GC-10 validates spacing after a custom symbol, which is partially covered by GENC-5's broader focus on spacing rules.
GC-11 validates placement of the symbol after digits, which is partially covered by GENC-2's broader focus on symbol requirements.
GC-12 validates negative sign placement before digits and spacing rules, which are partially covered by GENC-3 and GENC-5 respectively.
GC-13 validates disallowance of negatives and spacing rules, which are partially covered by GENC-3 and GENC-5 respectively.
Both categories validate the use of parentheses for negative values.
Both categories validate disallowance of negative values.
GC-16 validates Brazilian Real format with symbol and spacing rules, which are partially covered by GENC-2 and GENC-5 respectively.

generated_to_golden.reason: Both categories focus on default behavior without specific constraints or options.
GENC-2 broadly tests symbol requirements, partially covering GC-5, GC-11, and GC-16.
GENC-3 broadly tests negative value handling, partially covering multiple golden categories related to negatives.
GENC-4 broadly tests decimal handling, partially covering GC-2, GC-3, and GC-4.
GENC-5 broadly tests spacing rules, partially covering multiple golden categories related to spacing and separators.
